title: Electricity Consumption Predictor
description: A high-fidelity ML dashboard comparing Linear Regression & Decision Trees for load forecasting. Features real-time metric tracking and automated model selection based on accuracy.

title: Focus Flow: Productivity Dashboard
description: A modern focus tracking app designed to minimize distractions and maximize deep work sessions. Features a minimalist dark dashboard and real-time activity analytics.

title: Nexus E-Commerce Platform
description: A next-generation e-commerce mobile application designed for high-end luxury brands, featuring seamless checkout flows, AR product previews, and minimalist aesthetics.
